name: FLYWHEEL ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY, INC.
business: Flywheel Advanced Technology, Inc. is a shell company with nominal assets and no significant operations. Its subsidiary Blue Print Global, Inc. sources and sells robotic arm coffee solutions and warehouse patrol robots.

exposures.sentence: Blue Print, as a supplier of a Robotic Arm Coffee Solutions, appointed XCoffee as its authorized non-exclusive agent to distribute the Product in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.
Blue Print Global, Inc. ( Blue Print ) in the British Virgin Islands to establish an operation to source the supply and sale of warehouse patrol robots.

catalysts.event: Agency agreement with XCoffee Robotics Trading Ltd. for distribution of robotic arm coffee solutions in Abu Dhabi
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, Blue Print, entered into an Agency Agreement (the Agency Agreement ) with XCoffee Robotics Trading Ltd. of Abu Dhabi ( XCoffee ).
